title: diphyes tenompokensis
intro: Diphyes tenompokensis, also known as the tenompoken tree, is a plant species native to Borneo, belonging to the genus Diphyes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Diphyes tenompokensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies. In traditional herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices that can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
